name: Butterfly Valve Lockout
shortDescription: Slotted polypropylene cover that locks a butterfly valve lever in the closed position.
longDescription: A UV-stabilised polypropylene lockout with 12 locking slots at the base and 6 at the top, fitting over a butterfly valve lever to hold it in the closed position across a range of handle angles until the padlock is removed.

images.alt: Butterfly Valve Lockout supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
